segments.text: God spoke all these words, saying,
I am Yahweh your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall have no other gods before me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall not make for yourselves an idol, nor any image of anything that is in the heavens above, or that is in the earth beneath, or that is in the water under the earth:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: you shall not bow yourself down to them, nor serve them, for I, Yahweh your God, am a jealous God, visiting the iniquity of the fathers on the children, on the third and on the fourth generation of those who hate me,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and showing loving kindness to thousands of those who love me and keep my commandments.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall not misuse the name of Yahweh your God,  for Yahweh will not hold him guiltless who misuses his name.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “Remember the Sabbath day, to keep it holy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall labor six days, and do all your work,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: but the seventh day is a Sabbath to Yahweh your God. You shall not do any work in it, you, nor your son, nor your daughter, your male servant, nor your female servant, nor your livestock, nor your stranger who is within your gates;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: for in six days Yahweh made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that is in them, and rested the seventh day; therefore Yahweh blessed the Sabbath day, and made it holy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “Honor your father and your mother, that your days may be long in the land which Yahweh your God gives you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall not murder.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall not commit adultery.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall not steal.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall not give false testimony against your neighbor.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “You shall not covet your neighbor’s house. You shall not covet your neighbor’s wife, nor his male servant, nor his female servant, nor his ox, nor his donkey, nor anything that is your neighbor’s.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the people perceived the thunderings, the lightnings, the sound of the trumpet, and the mountain smoking. When the people saw it, they trembled, and stayed at a distance.
They said to Moses,
Speak with us yourself, and we will listen; but don’t let God speak with us, lest we die.
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: Moses said to the people,
Don’t be afraid, for God has come to test you, and that his fear may be before you, that you won’t sin.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The people stayed at a distance, and Moses came near to the thick darkness where God was.
Yahweh said to Moses,
This is what you shall tell the children of Israel: ‘You yourselves have seen that I have talked with you from heaven.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall most certainly not make gods of silver or gods of gold for yourselves to be alongside me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall make an altar of earth for me, and shall sacrifice on it your burnt offerings and your peace offerings, your sheep and your cattle. In every place where I record my name I will come to you and I will bless you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If you make me an altar of stone, you shall not build it of cut stones; for if you lift up your tool on it, you have polluted it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You shall not go up by steps to my altar, that your nakedness may not be exposed to it.’
segments.speaker: God
